dr_question: How can Elexion Automotive use real-time data from IoT sensors embedded in vehicles and manufacturing equipment, combined with digital engineering-enabled digital twins, to enhance predictive maintenance and minimize downtime in production lines by the end of 2025?

question_source.dr_question: How can Elexion Automotive use real-time data from IoT sensors embedded in vehicles and manufacturing equipment, combined with digital engineering-enabled digital twins, to enhance predictive maintenance and minimize downtime in production lines by the end of 2025?
